best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-login-001 title: user successfully logs in with correct credentials module: login source pages: 5 preconditions: user has registered and stored credentials in the database. test data: username: "testuser", password: "testpassword" test steps: 1. user enters "testuser" as username and "testpassword" as password. 2. application dispatches credentials to the server. 3. server verifies credentials against the database. 4. server confirms credentials match. 5. application logs in the user. expected result: user is redirected to the home page.
